whyUs.title: Why Do Successful Salons Choose SkinLab?
whyUs.subtitle: We don't just sell machines – as your partner, we help you get the fastest return on your investment.
whyUs.trainingDesc: 4-6 hours of in-person training + FAR certificate + video learning materials. We won't let you go until you use the device with full confidence.
whyUs.warrantyDesc: No need to wait weeks for overseas service. We respond within 24 hours, and if needed, provide a replacement device.
whyUs.financingDesc: From approx. ~89,000 HUF/month. No need to pay upfront – the machine's revenue covers the installments.
whyUs.consultingDesc: We help with pricing and marketing. We share what successful salons are doing.
whyUs.testimonialText: The training was great, and I can call them anytime I have a question.

testimonials.title: What Our Partners Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from Hungarian salon owners
testimonials.quote1: The Prestige4WAVE paid for itself in 3 months. The training was professional, and the local service is reassuring.
testimonials.quote2: In the very first month, our revenue grew by 20% thanks to laser treatments.
testimonials.quote3: Since getting the HydraCrown machine, we've attracted a whole new clientele. The AI skin diagnostics impresses them.

howItWorks.title: How Does It Work?
howItWorks.subtitle: 4 simple steps to a successful start
howItWorks.step1Desc: Free in-person or online demonstration where you get to know the machines
howItWorks.step2Desc: We help you choose the best machine for your salon
howItWorks.step3Desc: On-site installation and 4-6 hours of hands-on training
howItWorks.step4Desc: Ongoing support, service and business consulting

finalCta.title: Ready to Take Your Salon to the Next Level?
